tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm 90% done and the deadline is in thirty minutes, so I just need to finish this quickly. No time for anything else right now.
The deadline just passed while I was still at 95%, and now the system is screaming about ten minutes left. Great, I missed it completely despite being so close.
I'm almost done, but the system's screaming about a deadline that already passed. I missed it completely despite being so close.
I pushed through the last bit of work despite the stress, finally hitting 99% completion. The system's deadline panic was pointless since I'm almost done.

desires: Get this assignment submitted immediately to stop the system from flagging me as late, even though I'm technically past the deadline.
Avoid any awkward conversation with the professor about missing the cutoff since I value minimizing interpersonal friction over explaining my impulsive timing.
Collapse into bed or nap immediately because my energy is low and I need to recover before tomorrow's coursework block.
Ignore the low-priority note tidying task entirely since it offers no immediate academic reward and I have zero patience for non-urgent work right now.

goals.description: Force-click submit immediately to lock in the partial credit, even though the deadline passed 30 minutes ago.
goals.rationale: My achievement axis (0.5) demands a tangible result over perfection, and my impulsive nature cannot tolerate the risk of waiting for a 'perfect' moment that may never come. With progress at 98.7%, the immediate reward of 'done' outweighs the future consequence of lateness. I need this output now to satisfy my need for completion.

goals.description: Immediately close the browser tab and ignore any automated 'late submission' email notifications from the professor.
goals.rationale: I am highly avoidant of conflict. Checking for rejections or potential emails invites social friction and requires me to explain my procrastination, which drains my energy. By physically closing the window, I minimize the chance of an uncomfortable interaction and protect my current stress levels.

goals.description: Collapse into bed or nap immediately to recover energy before tomorrow's coursework block.
goals.rationale: My sleep discipline is low (3), but my physical stamina and focus capacity are dipping after this high-stress burst. My short planning horizon makes me prioritize immediate relief from fatigue over maintaining a strict schedule, especially since the 'urgent' task is technically submitted.

goals.description: Do not touch the 'filler_task' (note tidying) until the submission panic has completely subsided.
goals.rationale: My short planning horizon causes me to discount future benefits (tidy notes due Friday) when faced with an immediate crisis. Trying to multitask right now increases the risk of another failure; I need to clear this specific stressor first before I can focus on anything else.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances my primary achievement goal to force-click submit immediately (98.7% -> 99%+). I'm ignoring the 'filler_task' and potential conflict with the professor by avoiding emails, prioritizing immediate completion over future consequences or social friction.

goals.description: Finalize and submit the assignment immediately to secure the 'A' before the 13:30 deadline.
goals.rationale: My achievement value (0.5) overrides all else; getting the grade is the only metric that matters right now. I am impulsive and will cut corners rather than risk missing the window.

goals.description: Do not reply to any professor messages or engage in post-submission social pleasantries until after submission.
goals.rationale: I am highly avoidant of conflict; interacting with the professor about a rushed job creates unnecessary friction and stress, which distracts from the primary goal of submission.

goals.description: Ignore the note tidying task entirely for the next few hours.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon means I discount future benefits (tidy notes) in favor of immediate academic payoff. The Friday deadline is irrelevant compared to today's due date.

desires: Secure the 'A' by submitting this assignment in the next thirty minutes, regardless of minor errors
